title: charness RCA-to-learning conversion ledger event
description: Single RCA event and whether it was converted into a recurrence-preventing durable artifact. Records are JSON objects, one per line in charness-artifacts/metrics/rca-ledger.jsonl. Closed enums are owned here; docs summarize them and must not extend them inline.

ts.description: UTC ISO8601 timestamp ending in Z (RFC3339, no offset).

converted.description: True when a recurrence-preventing durable artifact was produced for this event.

durable_kind.description: Bidirectional invariant: 'none' if and only if converted is false.

class_key.description: Short opaque non-PII identifier of the mistake class, for dedup and recurrence tracking.

caught_by.description: Who first surfaced the mistake. Nullable; a missing value never blocks a record.

seed.description: True marks a hand-entered historical event, excluded from the baseline-window rate.

ref.description: Opaque non-PII reference (issue number, commit sha, or repo-root-relative artifact path).

conversion_upgrade.description: True marks a re-conversion that upgrades the durable artifact for an already-converted class (the #184 tripwire response). It records artifact work, not a new occurrence of the mistake: excluded from conversion-rate denominators, not counted as a recurrence, and it does not clear an in-window tripwire. Requires converted=true.
